title: Emberveil Build Preset (v1)
description: Per-class build preset that drives the auto-attribute allocator and starting-equipment roll. Source-of-truth: src/game/buildPresets.js, exported as builds.json via scripts/emit-game-data.cjs.

classId.description: class id this build belongs to (warrior, mage, ...)

targetAttrs.description: Weights summing to 100 — interpreted as the desired share of the post-base attribute budget at level cap.

plateaus.description: Optional per-stat caps. Examples: { DEX: { until: 'hit95' } }, { CON: { atLeast: 0.5 } }.

weapons.description: Preferred weapon ids in priority order (drives starter equipment roll).

preferredSkills.description: Auto-skill picker biases toward these skill ids.
